objective: Compose one deterministic provisional issuer tier and valuation gap from a provenance-neutral GPPE observation and the accepted S5 computed P/S result.
claim_ceiling: E0 isolated candidate tier and valuation-gap kernel only; no approved product semantics, GPPE computation, financial mapping, stable handoff, ranking, strategy, replay, or release-readiness claim

requirements: queued S6 registration is merged to main
the implementation PR pins its exact current main base SHA
the frozen corpus path and SHA-256 are committed before execution
an independent reviewer is assigned before E0 acceptance
issue #169 contains the exact manifest path and SHA-256

dependencies.artifact: accepted provisional GPPE, tier, and valuation-gap discovery evidence
accepted issuer P/S and strategy candidate identity contract
accepted provisional issuer P/S kernel evidence
approved GPPE, tier, and financial comparison semantics

required_strata: computed S5 issuer P/S composed with one non-financial GPPE observation
traditional, tech, and large-model-native candidate bands at exact boundaries
negative and zero GPPE remain valid traditional-tier observations
target P/S midpoint and valuation-gap Decimal arithmetic
financial branch, unavailable input, and identity/time/currency mismatch rejection
ambient Decimal-context mutation and canonical semantic identity

release_activation.reason: S6 is an isolated provisional composite kernel; #59/#21 approval and #24/#25 candidate acceptance remain mandatory

negative_controls: binding, candidate-universe, P/S policy, issuer, cutoff, or currency identity mismatch
missing, unavailable, future, or financial GPPE input
missing, unavailable, or nonpositive S5 P/S input
stale semantic, S5 manifest, or public-golden identity
attempted provenance, registry, financial mapping, or release activation

invalidation: tier boundaries, target-band selection, valuation-gap formula, corpus, or kernel output change creates a new batch revision
shared-path need blocks the batch until an explicit integration lease exists
product approval, GPPE implementation, or financial mapping does not raise this provisional evidence ceiling
rollback: Revert the isolated S6 batch paths and evidence together; no accepted factor registry or runtime release may reference this provisional kernel.
